summary: v104.44.3 Bhada (Lumpsum) feature testing complete. All 14 backend tests pass. All 4 frontend forms verified with Bhada field present and Cash/Diesel fields removed.
seed_data_creation: Test VW entries created with TEST_BHADA_ prefix and auto-cleaned after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: v104.44.3 Bhada feature fully tested. Backend: Purchase-side bhada ledger sync (vw_purchase_bhada:{rst}) works correctly - create, edit, zero-delete, cascade-delete all verified. Sale-side bhada (vw_sale_bhada:{rst}) regression OK. Frontend: All 4 forms have Bhada field with correct data-testid attributes: bp-bhada (BP Sale Register), sv-bhada (Sale Voucher), pv-bhada (Purchase Voucher), delivery-truck-{idx}-bhada (DC Delivery). Total Bhada summary tile (delivery-total-bhada) present in DC Delivery. WhatsNew modal shows v104.44.3 at top.

backend: POST /api/vehicle-weight with trans_type='Receive(Purchase)' + bhada=2500 → vw_purchase_bhada:{rst} ledger created with Truck JAMA entry
PUT /api/vehicle-weight/{id}/edit with bhada=4000 on Purchase → ledger amount updates to 4000
PUT /api/vehicle-weight/{id}/edit with bhada=0 on Purchase → ledger auto-deleted
DELETE /api/vehicle-weight/{id} on Purchase with bhada → cascade-removes ledger
POST Sale entry with bhada=4000 → vw_sale_bhada:{rst} ledger (regression OK)
Vehicle Weight CRUD operations (list, create purchase, create sale, edit, delete) - no regression
frontend: BP Sale Register (Rice Bran) - Bhada field present (data-testid='bp-bhada'), placeholder 'Truck bhada (e.g. 4000)'
Sale Voucher (Sale Book) - Bhada field present (data-testid='sv-bhada'), Advance field present, helper text shows VW sync
Purchase Voucher - Bhada field present (data-testid='pv-bhada'), Advance field present, helper text shows RST auto-fetch
DC Delivery - Per-truck Bhada field (data-testid='delivery-truck-0-bhada'), Total Bhada summary tile (data-testid='delivery-total-bhada')
WhatsNew modal - v104.44.3 entry at top with Bhada feature description
